name: codex-science
description: An auditable scientific workbench with bounded research improvement loops for Codex

interface.shortDescription: Auditable research from question to artifact
interface.longDescription: Coordinate evidence-led literature research, dataset lineage, preregistered experiments, approval-aware compute, reproducible artifacts, independent review, and bounded plan-trace-eval-repair loops with pinned external capabilities.
defaultPrompt: Turn my research question into an auditable end-to-end study.
Build a source-to-claim literature synthesis with disconfirming evidence.
Run a bounded improvement loop until every declared research gate passes.
